name: Matching Pair Puzzle
description: Matching Pair Puzzle is a fun and engaging memory game built with Unity. Flip cards to find matching pairs and clear the board before time runs out. The game features multiple levels with increasing difficulty, exciting bonuses, and smooth audio-visual feedback to keep players entertained. Test your memory, improve concentration, and challenge yourself to complete each level faster with fewer moves. With colorful visuals and simple gameplay, Matching Pair Puzzle is perfect for players of all ages.
instructions: Tap Click on a card to flip it Match two identical cards to remove them Complete all pairs to finish the level Use hints or bonuses when available Beat the timer to win
